get.description:
Return all funds the authenticated user has access to.

Requires authentication only — no specific permission needed.
This endpoint bootstraps the fund selector before fund context exists.

schema.title: Response List My Funds Api V1 Me Funds Get

post.description:
Issue a JWT for an LLM agent.

Requires an authenticated user with ``funds:manage`` permission.
The agent token is scoped to the caller's fund and carries the
delegating user's ID for audit. The agent cannot be granted more
permissions than the delegating user holds.

get.description: Return all active portfolios for the authenticated user's fund.

schema.title: Response List Portfolios Api V1 Portfolios Get

get.description: Run integrity verification on the audit log hash chain.

post.description: Revoke a specific token by its JTI. Requires platform admin permission.
Revoke all tokens for a user. Requires platform admin permission.

schema.title: Response List Fund Access Api V1 Admin Funds  Fund Id  Access Get

get.description: List all DLQ topics with message counts.

schema.title: Response List Dlq Topics Api V1 Admin Dlq Get

get.description: Peek at messages in a DLQ topic without consuming them.

schema.title: Response Peek Dlq Topic Api V1 Admin Dlq  Topic  Get

post.description: Replay DLQ messages back to the source topic.

schema.title: Response Replay Dlq Topic Api V1 Admin Dlq  Topic  Replay Post

get.description: List all archived audit months, optionally filtered by fund.

schema.title: Response List Archives Api V1 Admin Archival Get

post.description: Trigger archival of all eligible months across all active funds.

schema.title: Response Run Archival Api V1 Admin Archival Run Post

post.description: Archive a specific fund/month to cold storage.

schema.title: Response Archive Fund Month Api V1 Admin Archival  Fund Slug   Year   Month  Post

get.description:
SSE endpoint for real-time event streaming.

The ``token`` query parameter is consumed by the auth middleware —
by the time we get here, ``RequestContext`` is already set.
